items.title: How Much Money Do Papa Johns Franchise Owners Really Make In A Year?
items.description: If you believe in better ingredients and better pizza and have the capital to back it up, opening a location for this chain could be a legitimate career move.

items.title: McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski reveals how often he eats at the fast-food chain
items.description: "Sometimes it might be a breakfast. Sometimes it might be a lunch. But hey, one of the perks of the job—you get to eat at McDonald's a lot."

items.title: 1 Growth Stock Down 65% to Buy Right Now
items.description: This digital advertising leader just crashed 65% from its peak. Here's why it may be time to buy the dip.

items.title: There Are Now More PE Funds Than McDonald’s Franchises. What’s Behind the Alts Explosion?
items.description: Private equity and venture funds now account for roughly 12% of investments in the US.

items.title: This Stock Is on Track to Become the Next Dividend King
items.description: McDonald's could become a Dividend King by late next year.
